author: doll-agent
content:
Done. companion::companion_size was pub but only called from its own companion_size_quadratic test - no callers anywhere in the workspace (verified via grep across ferray-core, ferray-linalg, ferray-stats, ferray-fft, ferray-ufunc, ferray-numpy-interop, ferray-python, the ferray meta-crate, and benchmarks). The function duplicated trim-trailing-zeros logic already inlined into companion_matrix.

Deleted the function and its lone test.

ferray-polynomial: 133 tests pass (was 134), clippy clean. Net -21 lines. Commit f127a0d1.
